name: BEN_PL_F
description: BEN_PL_F identifies a discrete and formally defined compensation offering which is categorized by only one plan type, has one or more activity base rates, shares a known set of eligibility criteria and when applicable, has a fixed set of provided option. For health and welfare benefits, a plan is provided by a  third-party administrator or carrier.   Plan has a number of columns which are prefixed with "NIP," indicating not in program, such columns are used only when the plan is not incorporated into a program,all the remaining attributes apply to the characteristics of the plan either independent of any program affinity or in the context of the program. Examples are  Acme Be Well HMO,Acme Stock Purchase Plan, Acme HQ Employee Savings Plan.

columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
